title: ReviewPanelRequest
description: Input to the review_panel skill — consolidates worker/team_lead/judge verdicts into a final panel decision

reviews.description: One entry per reviewer participating in the panel

reviewer.description: Unique name or ID of the reviewer

role.description: Reviewer role — determines weighting in the 'weighted' consolidation strategy

verdict.description: This reviewer's verdict for the artifact under review

score.description: Optional numeric quality score [0.0–1.0] — used by the 'weighted' consolidation strategy

notes.description: Free-form rationale; warn/fail notes become recommendations in the panel output

task_ref.description: Reference to the task, artifact, or PR being reviewed (used verbatim in output)

consolidation.description: Strategy for consolidating individual verdicts into a final panel verdict. majority: most common verdict wins (tie-break by severity). unanimous: pass only if all pass. weighted: worker=0.3, team_lead=0.5, judge=0.2 on scores; threshold 0.6=pass, 0.4=warn.
